title: helictotrichon ausserdorferi
intro: Helictotrichon ausserdorferi, also known as the Ausserdorfer's oat grass or feather grass, is a type of ornamental grass belonging to the genus Helictotrichon. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Helictotrichon ausserdorferi include soothing digestive issues, relieving stress and anxiety, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be made by steeping the leaves or roots in hot water to utilize its medicinal and health benefits.
